data.title: Price of APT drops by 4.4% to $4.12, testing critical support level. Oversold conditions may offer buying chances.
data.description: The price of APT has dropped to $4.12, reaching critical support levels. Technical indicators are signaling oversold conditions, potentially offering buying opportunities for traders willing to take on risk.

data.title: Circle is exploring 'reversible' USDC transactions to integrate stablecoins into the financial system.
data.description: The president of Circle suggests that stablecoins could become an integral component of the traditional financial system due to their transaction reversibility feature. This development highlights the potential for stablecoins to establish a crucial presence in legacy financial institutions.

data.title: Bitcoin and altcoins struggling to reach new highs like gold and stocks due to stablecoin liquidity issues on exchanges.
data.description: This month, there was a notable disparity between the performance of Bitcoin and altcoins compared to gold and stocks, as they did not reach all-time highs. A key factor in this divergence was the insufficient presence of stablecoin liquidity on cryptocurrency exchanges.
Moderna To Invest Over £1 Billion In UK R&D As Part Of 10-Year Partnership With UK Government

data.title: StoneX Payments strengthens cross-border payment capabilities with Hana Bank, forging a correspondent banking relationship.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, StoneX Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SNEX) revealed a new development where the Payments Division of its London subsidiary, StoneX Financial Ltd (“SFL”), has formalized a correspondent banking alliance with Hana Bank’s London branch. This move signifies a notable growth in StoneX's strategic collaboration with Hana Bank from Seoul.

data.title: NEAR Protocol price falls 4.63% to $2.86, remains promising with AI integration and network upgrade for rebound.
data.description: The cryptocurrency NEAR Protocol is currently trading at $2.86, marking a 4.63% decrease in its daily value. Despite this downturn, recent integration of artificial intelligence and a network upgrade suggest the potential for a recovery from crucial support levels.

data.title: Stellar lumens price falls 1.93% to $0.36, testing vital support at this level with mixed signals.
data.description: The price of XLM has decreased by 1.93% to $0.36, prompting a test of crucial support levels. Technical indicators reveal a neutral RSI and bearish momentum, contrasting with the general bullish trend of the market.

data.title: PHITEX + MICECONnect 2025 generate over PHP 1B in sales leads, strengthen global tourism partnerships in the Philippines.
data.description: On September 10, 2025, in Manila, Philippines, the Philippine Travel Exchange (PHITEX) and MICECONnect 2025 wrapped up, marking the successful conclusion of the country's primary government-run travel trade and MICE platforms.

data.title: LTIMindtree introduces BlueVerse™ RightAction™ for faster, safer, and compliant enterprise AI. #AI #LTIM.
data.description: In an announcement made today, LTIMindtree unveiled the launch of BlueVerse™ RightAction™, aimed at facilitating Faster, Safer, and Compliant Enterprise AI operations.

data.title: Litecoin (LTC) price dips to $104.28, down 2.37%, near Bollinger Band lower boundary, signaling possible bounce from oversold levels.
data.description: The price of LTC has decreased by 2.37% to reach $104.28, testing a significant support level near the lower boundary of the Bollinger Band. At the same time, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is indicating a potential opportunity for a bounce due to oversold conditions.

data.title: Bitcoin & altcoins failed to reach all-time highs like gold & stocks due to inadequate stablecoin liquidity on exchanges.
data.description: This month, Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies did not reach record highs alongside gold and stocks, partly due to insufficient stablecoin liquidity on crypto exchanges.
